name: Hide and Seek
author: Poki
description: Hide and Seek takes your favorite childhood game to a whole new level—set in a school with a scary twist! The teacher isn't your ordinary hide and seek game player; she's out to catch you! Find the perfect hiding spot, use your quick reflexes to escape, and outsmart her at every turn. Rescue your teammates to earn coins and gain the upper hand. And here's the fun part: sometimes, the tables turn, and you get to chase and catch her! Ready for some high-stakes hide and seek? How to play Hide and Seek? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or click and drag to move! Who created Hide and Seek? Hide and Seek is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: School Escape! ! How can I play Hide and Seek for free? You can play Hide and Seek for free on Poki. Can I play Hide and Seek on mobile devices and desktop? Hide and Seek can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
